LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NKECHI EMERUWA'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, DEEMED ADMITTED, AGAINST DEFENDANT, ELLEN D. HATHAWAY, UNDER C.C.P. $ 2033.010 ET. SEQ. AND REQUEST FOR COSTS, SANCTIONS, AND ATTORNEYS FEES UNDER C.C.P. S 2023.010 ET. SEQ. AGAINST DEFENDANT, ELLEN D. HATHAWAY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,635.00 - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM RFA'S ADMITTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2033.280(C) IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT THE RFA'S WERE NOT SERVED AND THAT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL LEANED OF DISCOVERY WHEN THE INSTANT MOTION WAS SERVED. (DECLARATION OF GREGORY V. DEBERNARD.) ALSO, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO INITIATE MEET AND CONFER PRIOR TO FILING THE INSTANT MOTION. SANCTIONS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHALL RESPOND TO RFA'S WITHIN TEN DAYS FROM ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-07-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Off Calendar May-02-2016 Arbitration Award Filed

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Have Request For Admissions, Set One, Deemed Admitted, Against Defendant, Ellen D. Hathaway, Under C.C.P. $ 2033.010 Et. Seq. And Request For Costs, Sanctions, And Attorneys Fees Under C.C.P. S 2023.010 Et. Seq.Agatnst Defendant, Ellen D. Hathaway, In The Amount Of $1,635.00
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jake Jewell-Cohen of Carpenter, Zuckerman & Rowley, LLP telephone number 310-273-1230 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.
David Lane of Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard telephone number 925-977-1400 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NKECHI EMERUWA'S Motion To Have Request For Admissions, Set One, Deemed Admitted, Against Defendant, Ellen D. Hathaway, Under C.C.P. $ 2033.010 Et. Seq. And Request For Costs, Sanctions, And Attorneys Fees Under C.C.P. S 2023.010 Et. Seq. Against Defendant, Ellen D. Hathaway, In The Amount Of $1,635.00 - Plaintiff's motion to deem RFA's admitted pursuant to CCP section 2033.280(c) is denied. Defendant has presented evidence that the RFA's were not served and that Plaintiff's counsel leaned of discovery when the instant motion was served. (Declaration of Gregory v. DeBernard.) Also, Plaintiff failed to initiate meet and confer prior to filing the instant motion. Sanctions denied. Defendant shall respond to RFA's within ten days from entry of this order. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
